body:
## What's Changed

* Added more paths to the Buster module dictionary by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/700](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/700)
* Updated headless Firefox by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/701](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/701)
* Updated CMS fingerprint files by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/705](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/705)
* Fixed consistency between `wp_enum` and `cms/wp_enum` versions by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/702](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/702)
* Marked "Directory Traversal File Include" vulnerability as false positive by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/703](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/703)
* Fixed Angular detection by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/706](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/706)
* Added Python 3.14 support by @devl00p in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/709](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/709)
* Added SPIP plugin detection by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/707](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/707)
* Added devcontainer environment by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/711](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/711)
* Upgraded PHP version in the endpoint container by @devl00p in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/712](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/712)
* Forced `aiosqlite` version lower than 0.22.0 by @devl00p in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/713](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/713)
* Fixed cookie-based detection and added tests by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/708](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/708)
* Deprecated the `wp_enum` module by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/716](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/716)
* Added a JWT option by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/717](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/717)
* Fixed non-working `--side-file` option by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/718](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/718)
* Marked "Backup Files" vulnerabilities as false positives by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/720](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/720)
* Added WordPress WPML Multilingual CMS plugin detection to the CMS module by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/722](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/722)
* Added Drupal plugin detection by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/723](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/723)
* Added a Printer module by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/721](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/721)
* Removed version field from docker-compose files by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/726](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/726)
* Fixed `.gitignore` for integration tests by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/727](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/727)
* Updated PHP version by @MathisFranel in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/729](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/729)
* Improved `mod_exec` by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/719](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/719)
* Updated `gitlab-ci.yml` by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/730](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/730)
* Added detection for CVE-2024-55591 by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/704](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/704)
* Added Ivanti detection module by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/731](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/731)
* Added Palo Alto detection and version fingerprinting module by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/732](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/732)
* Added Magento and TYPO3 CMS detection by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/724](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/724)
* Improved Dockerfiles by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/734](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/734)
* Fixed regression affecting webpages in reports by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/735](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/735)
* Fixed `core-js` detection issue in `mod_wapp` by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/733](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/733)
* Fixed and standardized Ivanti and Palo Alto modules by @bretfourbe in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/737](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/737)
* Fixed Palo Alto ETag detection by @bretfourbe in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/738](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/738)
* Fixed regex in the `information_disclosure` module by @bretfourbe in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/739](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/739)
* Installed Playwright Firefox in `/opt` for multi-user access by @Qwarctick in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/740](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/740)
* Removed body and headers from responses when `detail_report_level = 1` by @bretfourbe in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/741](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/741)
* Fixed Forti error and TYPO3 false positive by @bretfourbe in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/744](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/744)
* Added detection patterns for modern DBMS by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/752](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/752)
* Fixed `[FF]` placeholder not being replaced in XSS payloads by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/753](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/753)
* Added detection patterns for modern frameworks and ORMs by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/754](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/754)
* Added missing indexes on frequently filtered database columns by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/756](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/756)
* Added support for XHTML and XML content types in XSS detection by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/755](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/755)
* Optimized XSS module by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/747](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/747)
* perf(explorer): use sets for O(n) → O(1) request lookups by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/758](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/758)
* perf(mod_takeover): reuse a shared `httpx.AsyncClient` by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/760](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/760)
* perf(attack): switched `attacked_get` / `attacked_post` from lists to sets by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/761](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/761)
* perf(stickycookie): removed artificial delays in MITM proxy by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/762](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/762)
* Speeded up `mod_backup` using concurrent requests by @hbenazha in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/757](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/757)
* Modernized Firefox user-agent by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/763](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/763)
* perf(intercepting_explorer): optimized browser waits and clicks by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/764](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/764)
* Added Python 3.14 support in TOML configuration by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/767](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/767)
* Added SQLite PRAGMAs to improve I/O performance by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/766](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/766)
* Fixed triple N+1 query issue in `_get_paths()` by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/765](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/765)
* Allowed running both crawlers sequentially by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/768](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/768)
* Grouped transactions in `add_payload`, `save_request`, and `save_requests` by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/769](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/769)
* Fixed N+1 query issue in `get_payloads()` by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/749](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/749)
* perf(persister): avoided unnecessary deep copies during serialization by @fwininger in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/750](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/750)
* Improved scanning of URLs with uppercase hostnames by @ArseneCBW in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/743](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/743)
* Fixed Tomcat image used in tests by @Qwarctick in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/773](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/773)
* Code review fixes — batch 2026-05 by @devl00p in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/777](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/777)
* Fixed bugs based on May 2026 crash reports and updated documentation by @devl00p in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/778](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/778)
* Updated changelog and copyright date by @devl00p in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/779](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/779)
* Bumped version to 3.3.0 and updated manpages by @devl00p in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/780](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/780)

## New Contributors

* @MathisFranel made their first contribution in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/729](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/729)
* @hbenazha made their first contribution in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/757](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/757)
* @ArseneCBW made their first contribution in [https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/743](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/743)

**Full Changelog**: [[wapiti 3.2.10...3.3.0 comparison](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.10...3.3.0)](https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.10...3.3.0)

## What's Changed
* Rework HTML report by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/694
* Use parallelism for some attack modules and fix -v0 option by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/695
* release 3.2.10 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/696


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.9...3.2.10

## What's Changed
* Remove parsing of SWF files by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/685
* Use playwright instead of wapiti-arsenic by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/686
* Relax dependencies more by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/687
* remove loguru dependency, add utility for installing firefox headless by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/688
* improve terminal coloring by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/689
* fix xml report generator by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/692
* convert body of crawled pages to string for detailed reports by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/693


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.8...3.2.9

## What's Changed
* relax dependencies by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/683
* release v3.2.8 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/684


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.7...3.2.8

## What's Changed
* Rework headers management by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/677
* Pass headers specified by swagger files to generated requests by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/679
* bump some dependencies by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/680

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.6...3.2.7

## What's Changed
* Add NS takeover checking in mod_takeover by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/667
* Fix mod_unsecure_password by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/678


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.5...3.2.6

## What's Changed
* fix wappalyzer user warnings and deprecation warnings in other modules by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/648
* Move attack management to a new ActiveScanner class by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/650
* upgrade httpx by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/651
* Upgrade httpcore and mitmproxy by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/652
* Improve mod_nikto support by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/653
* Add a new intermediate class for iter_forms by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/655
* Remove the original request ID previously kept on payloads in sqlite3 db by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/656
* Make `parameter` optional on `add_payload` with `None` default value by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/657
* Adapt to Apache branding used my Wappalyzer by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/658
* Refactoring on wapiti_main function by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/660
* refactor wapiti_main: group attack_options logic in a single function by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/661
* Passive scanner by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/664
* Release 3.2.5 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/666


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.4...3.2.5

## What's Changed
* Remove pylint-ignore which is old and block dependencies on CI by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/643
* wapiti 3.2.4: support Python 3.13 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/645


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.3...3.2.4

## What's Changed
* Use a modified arsenic packaged under another name to pass pypi restr… by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/633
* Bump aiohttp from 3.10.2 to 3.10.11 by @dependabot in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/629
* Fix false positives on ID command injections attacks by @tarraschk in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/638
* Use wapiti-swagger for Swagger/OpenAPI parsing by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/640
* Support Python 3.12 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/604
* release 3.2.3 to support python 3.12 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/642


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.2...3.2.3

## What's Changed
* Improvements for Windows compatibility by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/630
* use an arsenic fork fixed for python 3.12 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/631
* Release 3.2.2 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/632


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.1...3.2.2

## What's Changed
* Bump aiohttp from 3.9.4 to 3.10.2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/610
* crawler: fix empty enctype case by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/614
* Fix integration tests by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/615
* remove stale dependency on "six" by @a-detiste in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/616
* Fix documentation by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/620
* doc: fix wiki link in readme file by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/622
* Remove the need for the asyncio stop Event on attacks by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/626
* fix a step of the dns endpoint dockerfile for integration tests by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/627
* Prepare v3.2.1 by @devl00p in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/628

## New Contributors
* @a-detiste made their first contribution in https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/pull/616

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/wapiti-scanner/wapiti/compare/3.2.0...3.2.1

- Update mod_nikto, mod_wapp databases
- Search known CVEs for software versions versions found by mod_wapp
- Add `--cookie-value` option to easily pass cookies to the crawler
- Add a `mod_ldap` module for error-based and boolean-based LDAP injection
- `mod_ssl` is now based on the `sslcan` binary, install it on our own
- Improvements on `mod_network_device` (detect Citrix, CheckPoint, FortiWeb, FortiNet, Harbor, etc)
- Scan APIs given a Swagger (OpenAPI) file
- Add capabilities to inject payloads inside JSON bodies
- Add Wordpress module and theme enumeration
- Add Drupal, SPIP, Joomla, PrestaShop enumeration module

mod_spring4shell: New Module to detect the Spring4Shell vulnerability
    mod_upload: New module to detect unrestricted file uploads (attempt to upload PHP code)
    mod_https_redirect: New module to detect lack of redirect-to-https behavior
    mod_crlf: Fix double-encoding errors
    mod_methods: In-depth check of methods allowed by a web server
    mod_permanentxss: Fix several bugs
    mod_xss: Detect if HTML injection is allowed when XSS injection failed
    mod_wapp: several improvements like CPE versions added to output
    mod_log4shell: Add Ubiquiti UniFi to targets
    mod_buster: Discovered assets are added to the generated report
    Core: make module errors more verbose
    Core: add a Dockerfile to quickly set up your own PHP endpoint
    CLI: renamed some authentication options
Support Python 3.11

31/01/2023
    Wapiti 3.1.6
    Wappalyze: improve detection with DOM rules
    Core: fix proxy option

LFI: adds a payload for loknop technique (chaining PHP filters)
    mod_cookie: Fix bad WSTG code for bad cookie attribute
    Core: use proxy settings for updating
    Core: fix creds options
    Core: update most dependencies

###  Wapiti 3.1.4

* Crawler: Adds support for Firefox headless (using the new `--headless` option)
* Core: improve authentication. You can now pass HTTP auth (basic, ntml, etc) AND login by sending creds to an HTML form
* Core: remove internationalization

Authentication related optionshave changed, check the manual page for information

## 09/07/2022: Wapiti 3.1.3
* Reports: Add a new --detailed-report option that will put HTTP responses (headers and bodies) in the report.
* Crawler: Add a new --mitm-port <PORT> option that will replace the crawler with an intercepting proxy (mitmproxy)
* Core: Dropped support of Python 3.7
Fix a crash that may occur after the crawling and before laucnhing attacks (`connection pool was closed`)

Wapiti 3.1.1
  Crawler: Fix a bug preventing Wapiti to scan websites with bad ciphers (SSL 3, TLS 1.0 for example)
  Report: Add some unicode emojis in the HTML report to indicate the criticality of each vulnerability
  XXE: more payloads to target non-PHP applications + raise a warning when the DTD file was reached by the target but exfiltration didn't succeed
  CLI: --update option will only update chosen modules
  CLI: New --data option allows to launch attacks on a single POST request. This option expect a url-encoded string.

Wapiti 3.1.0
    Crawler: Fix passing named "button" tags in HTML forms
    Modules: Skip modules that fails to load properly (missing dependencies, code error, etc)
    Log4Shell: Attack POST parameters too, support for attacks on VMWare vSphere and some Apache products (Struts, Druid and Solr)
    CSRF: Django anti-CSRF token added to the whitelist
    Modules: Added references to WSTG code for each supported attack, separate Reflected XSS from Stored XSS in reports
    Crawler: Improved the parsing of HTML redirections (meta refresh)
    HashThePlanet: Added a new module to detect technologies and software versions based on the hashes of files.
    Crawler: Removed httpx-socks dependencies in favor of builtin SOCKS support in httpx. SOCKS support is fixed.
    Crawler: Upgraded httpcore to latest version in order to fix the ValueError exception that could occur on modules with high concurrency (buster, nikto)
    Core: Load correctly resources if Wapiti is running from an egg file.
